pullRequest.title: Fix critical WiFi socket connection errors in ELM class
pullRequest.body:
- Fix socket read method: use recv() instead of read() for TCP/WiFi
- Fix socket write method: use sendall() instead of write() for TCP/WiFi
- Add port type validation for baudrate operations (serial only)
- Add conditional buffer reset handling (serial only)
- Fix timeout setting with proper socket methods
- Prevent AttributeError: 'socket' object has no attribute 'read/write/baudrate'
- fix https://github.com/cedricp/ddt4all/issues/1649

Resolves connection crashes with WiFi ELM adapters while maintaining serial/Bluetooth compatibility.
